description_long: This pedestrian adult is depicted as a stylized, athletic figure wearing a fitted hoodie with cat ears on the hood, fingerless gloves, and tight athletic pants. The hoodie features a front zipper, short sleeves, and a backpack with visible straps and a detailed back panel. The figure has visible tattoos on both arms, adding to the urban and contemporary appearance. The face is partially covered by glasses, and the hairstyle is medium-length and straight, tucked under the hood. The footwear consists of athletic sneakers with thick soles, suitable for walking or running in an urban environment.
description: A stylized athletic adult wearing a hoodie with cat ears, fingerless gloves, tattoos, and a backpack, standing in an upright pose with sneakers.
description_view_0: Front view shows the cat-eared hoodie, glasses, tattoos on both arms, and the backpack straps.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the hood, the arm tattoo, and the side of the backpack.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the detailed backpack, back tattoo, and the hood's cat ears.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the opposite arm tattoo, profile of the hood, and the backpack's side.
attribute_clothing_type: athletic hoodie with cat ears, fingerless gloves, fitted athletic pants, and a backpack
